content.en:
The core area of the mist area, that is, the Chaos God Realm, is actually very large, and Ye Tian's Life Heavenly Pupil was suppressed here before, and the range of sensing was limited, so he was unable to sense the true core of the Chaos God Realm.

At this moment, under the leadership of Niu Ryu, Ye Tian came to the core of the Chaos God Realm.

Here, he saw a glorious holy tower, endless holy light enveloped this area, and under the holy tower sat cross-legged a strong man with a bull head and a human body, the aura of these strong people far exceeded that of the first-class supreme, and there were even god-level powerhouses who were even more powerful than Niu Ryu.

"These should all be Ox Clan powerhouses!"

The Oxen Race is a semi-chaotic race in the chaos that contains the blood of chaotic life, which is sparse and ordinary in the chaos, but it is very powerful in the universe.

The Oxen have been in the universe for a long time, and have even survived many cosmic collapses.

"Ushiru, you're back!"

A strong man of the Ox Race who looked a little old spoke.

"Third Elder, this person has dodged my full force blow, and he is very close to the one-star god general, he has just broken through to the Earth Venerable realm, and his potential is very great, even far beyond the genius of our clan!" Niu Ryu said truthfully.

The three elders of the Ox Clan stared at Ye Tian, which made Ye Tian very stressed.

"This Third Elder should be a two-star god general!"

Ye Tian guessed.

"It's really good, even in the midst of chaos it's a genius, and the universe lacks a strong inheritance, so it's good to be able to reach this level. However, even so, we can't guarantee whether you can actually pass the assessment. "

The Third Elder said.

Ye Tian glanced around, his heart moved, and he suddenly showed his copying talent that he hadn't used for a long time.

In the universe, copying talents is not very useful at the moment, because he is not short of those talents, and it is difficult to gain anything.

But just now, it suddenly occurred to him that the Oxen Race came from Chaos, and perhaps their talent was not ordinary.

Wow!!!!

The talent of the cattle people was presented in Ye Tian's sight.

Cattle people: Niu Ryu

Cultivation talent: Mixed level

Strength Talent: Godly (Extreme)

Defense Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Speed Talent: God-level

Stick Talent: No superior

Earth Spear Talent: God-level

King Kong talent: God-level

......

Ox Human: Ox Hitomi

Cultivation talent: Mixed level

Strength Talent: God

Defense Talent: God-level

Speed Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Stick Talent: No superior

Fire Talent: God-level

Water Curtain Talent: God-level

......

Ye Tian looked at the talents of the cattle race one by one, and was immediately shocked.

"Extreme talent!"

Although not all Oxen have extreme talents, there are many Oxen who have extreme talents!

In the Origin Realm, many Source Beasts possessed the ultimate strength talent, but that was the racial talent given to them by the Origin Realm, not their own cultivation.

Most of the cattle people do not have extreme talents, and a small number have extreme talents, but some have extreme talents, some are speed extreme talents, and there are different types of extreme talents.

This is not normal!

"They are the ultimate talents that have been cultivated!"

Ye Tian guessed.

From Hamon's memory, I know that in the chaos, the ultimate talent is not a rotten street talent, but a very rare talent, and basically only some special races or descendants of strong people have extreme talents.

As for the extreme talent that has been cultivated, the Tibetan God Organization can't do it, and any method that can raise the talent to the limit of the god level is definitely a very rare method, and it is even enough to cause the madness and fight of the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

"The Ox Clan has mastered an extreme talent method that can be cultivated!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But this method must be very difficult to cultivate, otherwise there would not be so few extreme talents of the Ox Clan.

He also wants this method very much, but this method must be very precious, even the Tibetan God Organization does not have such a method, how can the Niu Ren clan give it to him easily?

Besides, how did he bring it up?

Extreme talent is such a thing, it's hard to see, even if it's a fight, it's hard to judge, unless it's a treasure that tests the talent and can test the extreme talent.

If he brought it up, the Ox Clan would definitely wonder how Ye Tian knew that they had an extreme talent, and it would be bad if the copying talent was exposed!

"God-level Extreme Defense Talent, copy!"

"God-level extreme speed talent, copy!"

Ye Tian instantly copied these two extreme talents into his hands, once he fused these two talents, then his strength, speed, and defense three basic talents would all reach the god-level extreme talent level, and his strength would skyrocket in an instant, which was much easier than penance!

If you cultivate step by step, if you want to improve so much, I'm afraid it will take hundreds of thousands or even millions of years.

Moreover, once he fuses these two extreme talents, his strength may be able to break the shackles and be directly promoted to the level of a one-star god general!

The only pity is that there are no supreme cultivation talents among these cattle clans, they are all mixed-level cultivation talents!

He had already understood one thing now, the mixed-level cultivation talent could also be promoted to the Heavenly Mandate Realm, but if he wanted to surpass the Heavenly Mandate Realm and reach the True Spirit Realm, it was estimated that he would need a supreme talent to succeed.

Although the extreme talent has been copied, Ye Tian still wants to obtain a similar method, after all, he doesn't need it, his relatives need it!

"Let's take the assessment first, maybe if the assessment is successful, you will be able to obtain this kind of method!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, Niu Ryu took Ye Tian into the holy tower.

The assessment takes place in the Holy Tower!

As for what the assessment content is, Niu Ryu didn't say.

Wow!

Ye Tian really entered the Holy Tower, and immediately a force enveloped him, teleporting him to an unknown place.

-------------

Rumble!!!

A terrifying monster appeared, its aura still belonging to the Earth Venerable realm, but its aura was not weaker than Ye Tian's.

"First Class Supreme Limit!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

"Hunyuan Domain!"

"Heaven Killing Knife!"

Ye Tian made a move in an instant and fought with this terrible monster, but only one blow only slightly injured this monster.

"The strength of this monster is not strong, I am infinitely close to a one-star god general, and it is a few small grades behind. However, I can't kill it immediately, otherwise I won't be able to stop it if a one-star god general monster appears behind!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he supported his defense with all his strength to resist this monster, and he began to fuse the god-level extreme defense talent and the god-level extreme speed talent, once he fused these two extreme talents, his strength skyrocketed, and he had a greater certainty of getting better results.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian endured the pain and continued to fuse the extreme talent.

At the same time, he used a smile to manipulate his body against the monster.

But in the process of fusion, Ye Tian was too painful, it was difficult to exert his strength, and he was constantly beaten, but his defense was very strong, after all, he was a half-step chaotic life body, so it was naturally not easy to be killed.

Half an hour later, Ye Tian successfully fused the god-level extreme defense talent, making his defense ability a notch higher.

"Continue to merge!"

Ye Tian began to fuse the god-level extreme speed talent.

Once the fusion is successful, not only will the base speed increase, but even the constant light supernatural power will also be enhanced.
